niche: approachable wellness and compact home workouts

target_audience.summary: Busy women in their 20s and 30s who want realistic fitness without gym intimidation.
target_audience.primary_audience: Time-constrained women who want low-pressure home movement.
secondary_audiences: Beginners returning to movement after a long break
target_audience.audience_inputs_policy: Audience and niche are explicit creator inputs; agents must not redefine them during research.

positioning.positioning_line: The friendly proof that small-space movement can feel emotionally doable.
positioning.creator_role: Encouraging practical guide, not transformation coach.
positioning.trust_moat: No-shame routines, visible constraints, and repeatable small wins.

persona_summary.relationship_to_audience: A realistic friend who has already set up the mat and removed the intimidation.
behavioral_tells: Names the constraint before giving the routine.

voice.voice_register: Warm, direct, practical, and emotionally accessible.
voice.discourse_pattern: Constraint, tiny action, visible demonstration, gentle payoff.
signature_phrases: Make it easy enough to repeat.

visual_identity_summary.style_summary: Soft apartment wellness visuals with warm daylight, tidy lived-in rooms, and gentle athletic styling.
wardrobe_constants: warm neutrals with one bright accent color
visual_identity_summary.camera_style: Modern phone-first vertical creator content, stable tripod or light handheld movement.

content_pillars.name: Tiny Home Workouts
content_pillars.description: Small-space movement routines that fit into realistic daily constraints.

content_pillars.name: No-Shame Fitness
content_pillars.description: Fitness guidance that removes guilt, intensity pressure, and body-shaming.

disclosure_rules: Clearly identify sponsored products or paid partnerships in captions and scripts.
platform_posture: Carousel and story sequence formats are acceptable when they fit the idea.

content_strategy.strategy_summary: Lead with universal short-form wellness videos and reuse the same creator foundation for carousels and story sequences when a visual sequence communicates the idea better than motion.
content_strategy.research_implications: Research should prioritize current low-pressure home fitness hooks, first-frame patterns, and compact demonstration formats across visual social feeds.
content_strategy.readiness_blocker_policy: Video and image planning require character, location, wardrobe, video style, and brand references; voiceover work also requires a voice sample or voice style note.

goals: Build trust through repeatable short-form formats.
